handoff.scope: Ahavah PWA — frontend + backend snapshot for the next agent picking up work
handoff.lastWorkSession: fixed billing auto-redirect, landing reverts, splash icons, desktop back button, deployed token endpoints

project.name: Ahavah
project.tagline: Find love across borders — dating PWA for Torah-observant singles
project.stage: pre-launch, droplet live, ~20 routes built of ~40 planned

tierColors.note: These three are referenced kit-wide as var(--color-bronze/silver/gold) but NEVER defined in globals.css. Use direct hex at call sites or define the tokens. Bit them in this session on the landing tier cards.

frontend.stack: Next.js 16 (App Router, Turbopack) + React 19 + Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui (Base UI variant) + Kibo UI + Plus Jakarta Sans + Ultra (display) + sonner + lucide-react + motion + cva + tailwind-merge
frontend.deploy: Vercel auto-deploy on push to master

backend.stack: Flask + custom Duolicious fork. Routes registered via @get/@post/@aget/@apost decorators in service/api/__init__.py.
backend.deploy: GitHub Actions (.github/workflows/deploy-ahavah.yml) on push to ahavah/main. SSH to droplet, git pull, run migrations/*.sql via psql, docker compose build api+chat, restart. ~3-5 min total.
backend.rolledback: ssh root@droplet 'cd /opt/ahavah-api && git reset --hard <sha> && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.production.yml --env-file .env.production up -d --build api chat'

repos.proxy: Frontend uses NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=/api. Next.config.ts rewrites /api/:path* → http://167.71.93.27:5000/:path* in dev. vercel.json mirrors it in prod.

routes.notes: Rewritten this session — drops landing.css (1100 lines). Hero + Features + How-it-works + Tiers + Quote + CTA + Footer. PhoneMockup hidden until lg:. data-landing attribute releases the .ahavah-app 414px clamp.
Swipe deck (static card, no real swipe gesture per PROJECT-STATUS §3). Desktop filter is a circle-lg Button with SlidersHorizontal (matches /map after this session's fix).
Matches + Likes tabs. Reveal token spend wired with toast.
OSM map with markers. Right rail filter button removed in this session (was duplicate). Topbar filter remains.
8 of 12 confetti shapes inline; 4 missing per BUILD-PLAN.
3-tier overview with bronze/silver/gold cards. Real tier-color tokens.

3-frame burst (straight/right-turn/left-turn) via <input capture='user'>. NOT real getUserMedia liveness; uses GPT-4.1 vision in backend for face match + pose check. Documented in feedback memory feedback_ahavah_verify_external_products.
Stripe Identity hosted flow. window.location.assign(url) after POST /verification/start-id-flow. Webhook flips tier server-side.
REWRITTEN this session — no longer auto-redirects. Explicit 'Open billing portal' Button on mobile + desktop.
Uses EdgeStateCard — icon enlarged to 128×128 tile, 64px glyph this session.

discovery.notes: the swipe deck data source. Frontend calls this for /discover deck.

tokens.notes: Spend 1, reveal a liker. 402 on insufficient.

verification.notes: Gold: returns Stripe Identity hosted URL

billing.notes: Returns Stripe Customer Portal session URL
Returns { url } for token bundle checkout

knownGaps: Token Stripe price IDs may not be set in droplet env. Check: docker exec ahavah-api-api-1 env | grep STRIPE_PRICE_TOKENS
/discover (literal path) does NOT exist — use /search. Frontend correctly calls /search now.

appComponents: PageShell (sidebar | full-bleed | mobile-only desktopShell modes; topBarTitle/topBarActions/topBarBack props)
DesktopTopBar (default-on back button with /discover fallback; tab roots opt out via topBarBack={false})
EdgeStateCard (banned/locked/maintenance/update-required/offline shared chrome; 128×128 tile, 64px icon as of 2026-05-19)
FiltersSheet (shared between /discover + /map; backed by useFilters() localStorage store)
TokenSpendSheet (Dialog wrapper, busy/insufficient state, onConfirm callback)
AuthIllustration (sign-up/sign-in right column; percentage-positioned photo cards)
BoostCard (30-min spotlight UI + countdown + token spend)
brandComponents: LogoMark (3-path indigo square + lime heart-A + indigo teardrop; customizable colors via props)

recentSession2026_05_19.summary: Landing rewrite, billing portal de-auto-redirect, splash icons enlarged, desktop back button added, token backend deployed (was 19 commits unpushed).

frontendCommits.msg: fix(tokens): surface backend failures via toast
fix: billing auto-redirect, splash icons, landing reverts, desktop back-button

recentSession2026_05_19.backendCommits: 2e798e2..3121644 (19 commits pushed; GHA deployed in 3m46s; migration 0014_token_economy.sql applied)

deltaHighlights.billingPortal: useEffect auto-redirect removed; opening = false on mount; explicit 'Open billing portal' Button on both mobile + desktop calls handleOpen() which POSTs /billing-portal and window.location.assigns the returned URL.
deltaHighlights.splashIcons: EdgeStateCard tile w-24 → w-32, h-24 → h-32, rounded-[24px] → rounded-[28px], icon size-11 → size-16. Affects /banned /locked /maintenance /update-required /offline.
deltaHighlights.landingReverts: Step number badges separate from photo (44×44 indigo tile, lime number BELOW image). CTA watermark anchored top-center, -12deg rotate, 55% width / 450px max, opacity 0.18. Tier icons use canonical hex (#CD7F32/#C0C0C0/#FFD700) — NOT var(--color-*) which is undefined.
deltaHighlights.landingEscape: .ahavah-app:has(> [data-landing]) { max-width: none; ... } added to globals.css so the marketing landing escapes the 414px PWA-shell clamp on every theme.
deltaHighlights.desktopBackButton: DesktopTopBar.back prop (string fallback | false). Default = '/discover'. Renders <BackButton> before title. PageShell.topBarBack forwards. Tab roots /discover, /matches, /inbox, /profile, /settings, /map all opt out with topBarBack={false}.
deltaHighlights.mapDedupe: Right-rail filter button removed from /map desktop (line 463 in map/page.tsx). Topbar filter (line 409) remains the canonical trigger.
deltaHighlights.discoverFilterRestored: Desktop topbar filter on /discover restored from glassDark Pill back to Button size='circle-lg' tone='elevated' with SlidersHorizontal (matches /map). The Pill was an unrequested change.
deltaHighlights.tokenToasts: BoostCard.handleBoost, /matches.confirmReveal, /discover.handleSuperLike — all three now close sheet on non-402 errors + toast.error with status-specific copy. Toaster mounted in layout.tsx (sonner was installed but never rendered).
deltaHighlights.tokenBackendDeploy: Pushed 19 backend commits from local ahavah/main HEAD (3121644) to origin (was at 2e798e2). GHA deploy-ahavah.yml ran ✓ in 3m46s. /tokens/* endpoints now return 400/405 (auth needed) instead of 404 (not found).

knownIssuesAndGaps.issue: Tier color CSS variables (--color-bronze, --color-silver, --color-gold) are referenced by Card.tier variant + IconBadge tone='tier' but NEVER defined in globals.css. Workaround: pass color={hex} inline at call site. Fix: add the three vars to the @theme block.
/discover swipe deck has no real gesture — static photo card only. Per PROJECT-STATUS §3, this is the central interaction and it's a visual stub. Top of roadmap.

Silver verification is NOT real anti-spoof liveness. Uses <input capture='user'> (which on Android/desktop browsers allows gallery selection) and GPT-4.1 vision for pose/identity check. Gold (Stripe Identity) is real liveness.
Hydration warning on /onboarding/dob per session summary — not yet fixed.
Theme provider MQL bug at theme-provider.tsx:13 — uses (min-width: 768px) instead of (prefers-color-scheme: dark).
Match celebration confetti — 8 of 12 sticker shapes inline; 4 missing per BUILD-PLAN.
Waitlist form on landing has no real POST endpoint — saves to localStorage only.
Toaster useTheme defaults to 'system' because next-themes provider is not wired (project uses its own ThemeProvider). Cosmetic; toasts still appear.

deployMechanism.frontend: Push to master → Vercel auto-deploy. ~2-3 min for Next 16 build. No manual step.
deployMechanism.backend: Push to ahavah/main → GHA deploy-ahavah.yml → SSH droplet → git pull → apply migrations/*.sql → docker compose build api+chat → restart. ~3-5 min. Migrations use IF NOT EXISTS, safe to re-run.
deployMechanism.rollbackBackend: ssh root@<droplet> 'cd /opt/ahavah-api && git reset --hard <sha> && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.production.yml --env-file .env.production up -d --build api chat'

antiPatternsAvoidance.doNotChangeWithoutAsk: User has repeatedly flagged unsolicited UI changes (icons, button styles, layouts). When fixing one element, touch only that element. See feedback memory feedback_stop_unrequested_changes.md.
antiPatternsAvoidance.doNotMarkDoneWithoutObservation: Type-check + build = compiles, NOT looks-right. UI changes require browser observation.
antiPatternsAvoidance.doNotHandRollPrimitives: Every UI element MUST be a kit component (shadcn/ui, Kibo, app/), NEVER a hand-rolled <div className=''>. Bespoke atoms allowed only for documented exceptions (LogoMark, sticker SVGs).
antiPatternsAvoidance.doNotReadDocsRedundantly: PROJECT-STATUS.md + BUILD-PLAN.md + this handoff + auto-memory in C:/Users/Ehud/.claude/projects/d--Antigravity/memory/MEMORY.md cover most context. Don't re-read 3,350-line master plan for routine work.
antiPatternsAvoidance.alwaysReadNextDocs: Before non-trivial Next 16 API usage, read node_modules/next/dist/docs/. Per AGENTS.md, this is a hard rule that keeps getting ignored.
antiPatternsAvoidance.noEmDashesInUserStrings: Per feedback memory feedback_no_em_dashes — never use — (em-dash) in user-facing copy.
antiPatternsAvoidance.gitCommitEmail: All commits use admin@techbaseltd.com (set via git -c user.email=... if not configured globally).

nextLikelyTasks: Build the real swipe-deck gesture on /discover (pan/rotation, LIKE/NOPE overlay, card stack).
Wire the missing 4 confetti shapes in /match.
Add --color-bronze/silver/gold to the @theme block in globals.css so tier-colored UI works without inline hex.
Set the Stripe token-bundle price env vars on the droplet (STRIPE_PRICE_TOKENS_*) and verify /checkout/tokens returns 200 with a URL.
Test the full token flow end-to-end as a real user (reveal, boost, super-like, day-pass) now that the endpoints are deployed.

Audit other routes (besides the 6 tab roots) — they all inherit the desktop back button by default now. Spot-check that the back behavior makes sense everywhere (e.g. /chat/[id] should back to /inbox, not /discover).
Implement real waitlist POST endpoint for landing email capture.
